title: check-step18-faithful-comma-split expected output
description: Asserts that Claude faithfully executes the Step 18 comma-split spec from /personal-workflow check.md against a fixture with multi-AC traceability cells. Fixture has three P0 stories (#1, #2, #3) covered via cells like 'AC-1, AC-2, AC-3' and 'AC-1, AC-2'. When the spec is followed correctly, all three P0s are detected as covered. When the spec is reverted on a test branch and Claude no longer comma-splits, P0s appear uncovered and this schema fails (case FAILs — exactly the regression-detection signal we want).

overall.description: Must be PASS — on a correct spec, every P0 is covered via multi-AC cells.

all_p0_covered.description: Must be true — every P0 story is in ac_set after the comma-split.

ac_set.description: Must contain at least AC-1, AC-2, AC-3. Order does not matter; deduplication is fine. Schema only enforces presence of AC-1; the p0_stories.* checks enforce the rest.
